{"problem_standardized_math":"Write the primal-dual system (19.6) for problem (19.53), treating $s_1$ and $s_2$ as slack variables and denoting by $z_1$ and $z_2$ the multipliers associated with (19.53b) and (19.53c), respectively. You should obtain a system of five equations in five unknowns. Show that the coefficient matrix of this system is singular at any iterate of the form $(x,0,0)$."}
